response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, including strong recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience. Testing culture (TDD, test libraries authored) and communication skills (workshops, talks) are strong. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, Vitest is not named, and there is a current career gap since October 2025 worth clarifying in an interview.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple senior roles
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience listed in the primary/secondary stack
Current career gap since October 2025 needs clarification
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named, though testing expertise is evident
